---
title: "LLMs and AI Agents"
subtitle: "Day 1 - Block 2"
format:
  revealjs:
    footer: "TI Workshop | D1 B2"
    bibliography: ../../../resources/workshop-citations.bib
    embed-resources: true
---

## Training Objective at the Core [^s1]

$P \left (x_t \mid x_{<t}, \theta \right )$

- $x_t$: next token
- $x_{<t}$: previous tokens
- $\theta$: learned parameters



[^s1]: Sources: @vaswani2017attention; @brown2020fewshot

## AI agents are 🧅s {.center}

::: {.r-fit-text}

LLM at the center

:::

It is still next-token prediction![^s2]

[^s2]: Sources: @brown2020fewshot; @kaplan2020scaling

## Pre-training [^s3] {.center}

::: {.center}
![](../../assets/images/gao2021.png){width="74%" fig-align="center"}
:::

[^s3]: Sources: @kaplan2020scaling; @hoffmann2022chinchilla

## Post-training [^s4]

| Stage | Main goal | Typical effect |
|---|---|---|
| Pre-training | Generation | Capability |
| Post-training | Alignment | Compliance |

[^s4]: Sources: @rafailov2023dpo; @brown2020fewshot

## Tokens Can Become Actions [^s5] {.center}

```json
{"tool":"web_search","query":"latest ECB inflation forecast"}
```

::: {.center}
```{mermaid}
%%| fig-align: center
sequenceDiagram
  participant M as LLM
  participant T as Tool/API
  M->>T: action token -> tool call
  T->>M: observation/result
```
:::


[^s5]: Sources: @schick2023toolformer; @yao2022react

## Actions can pull in fresh context [^s6]

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-align: center
flowchart LR
  Q[Prompt] --> R[Web-search]
  R --> K[Filter]
  K --> C[Read]
  C --> G[Continue generation]
```

[^s6]: Sources: @lewis2020rag; @yao2022react

## Agents ❤️ Code [^s7]

```python
result = run_python("sum([2.1, 3.4, 5.0])")
context += f"Observed: {result}"
answer = llm(context)
```

> Powerful!

## {background-video="../../assets/videos/agents_tool_calls.mp4" background-size="contain" background-video-loop="false"}

[^s7]: Sources: @schick2023toolformer; @yao2022react

##


```{mermaid}
%%| fig-align: center
%%| width: 100%
flowchart LR
  C[Context] --> A[LLM]
  
  A -->|call| T[Tools]
  A -->|write| M[Memory]
  A -->|generate| END{END}
  A -->|generate| C
  
  T --> E[Environment]
  M --> C
  E --> C

  style A fill:#90EE90,stroke:#333,stroke-width:1px
  style E fill:#bdd0ff,stroke:#f7f9fa,stroke-width:1px
  
```


[^s8]: Sources: @yao2022react; @lewis2020rag; @schick2023toolformer

## TODO (next revision)

- Add sustainability implications of AI use
- Cover energy, water, and e-waste tradeoffs


## References

::: {#refs}
:::
